forgottenPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgottenPassword.description: Enter your email address associated to your account and we will send you a one time link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.description: Enter your new password below. Make sure it's secure and at least 8 characters long.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.descriptionPrefix: We sent a verification email to
verifyEmail.descriptionSuffix: . Please tap the link inside that email to continue.

setup.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
setup.description: Use your authentication app to scan this QR code. If you don't have an authentication app on your device, you'll need to install one now.

verify.title: Enter your verification code
verify.description: Enter the code that you see in your authenticator app
verify.helpText: You can also paste your 6-digit code

complete.title: You're all set
complete.descriptionLine1: Now you can use the mobile authenticator app to get an authentication code any time you log in.
complete.descriptionLine2: Save these single-use backup codes in a safe place.
complete.footerText: These backup codes let you log in if you can't receive a text message or don't have access to any of your other two-factor authentication methods.
